response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive full-stack and AI-related experience, including work with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq. However, his background leans more toward software engineering and generalist development rather than deep AI strategy or cloud platform expertise. His entrepreneurial experience and open-source contributions are valuable, but he lacks direct evidence of building AI-powered products or platforms at scale, which is a key requirement for this role.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI-agent infrastructure)
Strong open-source contributions and entrepreneurship with GISCollective, demonstrating technical leadership and innovation
Experience with cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and modern software practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited direct experience with AI strategy, cloud platform architecture, or large-scale AI-powered product development
No clear evidence of building AI-focused platforms or products; most experience is in general software engineering
Lacks advanced AI/ML academic credentials (no Master's/PhD in AI-related field)
